name: ticketing-monorepo
description: Ticket management app — Fastify API, React (Vite) SPA, Supabase, with shared TypeScript types.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @ticketing/api && npm run build -w @ticketing/web
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @ticketing/api" "npm run dev -w @ticketing/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @ticketing/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @ticketing/web
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
